question: The choropleth map shows adult obesity rates for selected US states. Which statement is best supported by the map?

options.A: Individual state obesity percentages are easy to read precisely from the map.
options.B: Colorado clearly has the lowest obesity rate among the shown states.
options.C: West Virginia has an obesity rate of exactly 38%.
options.D: Because the map and text are very small, it is hard to read exact obesity rates for each state.

explanation: The map uses extremely small font sizes which make it difficult to read exact obesity percentages. Specific state values cannot be verified.
